name: Sloppy Toms
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and green bell pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are tender and golden brown.
3. Stir in the celery, soy beans, ketchup, vinegar, salt, black pepper, chili powder, dry mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Pour in the water and stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
6. Serve on buns.
